title: relay.add() has no SSRF guard on relay actor URL
description: In relay.rs add(), the relay_url is checked for the https:// prefix but is never checked against is_private_host_resolved(). An operator who runs 'broadside relay add https://192.168.1.x/actor' will trigger an outbound fetch to a private host. The Follow is also signed and sent to the inbox discovered from that document without host validation. This is operator-initiated (CLI), but it can be used to exfiltrate data or probe internal services from the server's network.
close_reason: Fixed: relay.rs now validates both relay URL host and inbox_uri host against is_private_host_resolved().
